x : α
r : Ordnode α
hl : l.Balanced
hr : r.Balanced
sl : l.Sized
sr : r.Sized
⊢ Ordnode.casesOn (motive := fun t => id l = t → Ordnode α) (id l)
      (fun h =>
        Ordnode.casesOn (motive := fun t => id r = t → Ordnode α) (id r) (fun h => Ordnode.singleton x)
          (fun rs rl rx rr h =>
            Ordnode.casesOn (motive := fun t => id rl = t → Ordnode α) (id rl)
              (fun h =>
                Ordnode.casesOn (motive := fun t => id rr = t → Ordnode α) (id rr) (fun h => node 2 nil x r)
                  (fun size l x_1 r h => node 3 (Ordnode.singleton x) rx rr) ⋯)
              (fun rls rll rlx rlr h =>
                Ordnode.casesOn (motive := fun t => id rr = t → Ordnode α) (id rr)
                  (fun h => node 3 (Ordnode.singleton x) rlx (Ordnode.singleton rx))
                  (fun rrs l x_1 r h =>
                    if rls < ratio * rrs then node (rs + 1) (node (rls + 1) nil x rl) rx rr
                    else node (rs + 1) (node (rll.size + 1) nil x rll) rlx (node (rlr.size + rrs + 1) rlr rx rr))
                  ⋯)
              ⋯)
          ⋯)
      (fun ls ll lx lr h =>
        Ordnode.casesOn (motive := fun t => id r = t → Ordnode α) (id r)
          (fun h =>
            Ordnode.casesOn (motive := fun t => id ll = t → Ordnode α) (id ll)
              (fun h =>
                Ordnode.casesOn (motive := fun t => lr = t → Ordnode α) lr (fun h => node 2 l x nil)
                  (fun size l lrx r h => node 3 (Ordnode.singleton lx) lrx (Ordnode.singleton x)) ⋯)
              (fun lls l x_1 r h =>
                Ordnode.casesOn (motive := fun t => id lr = t → Ordnode α) (id lr)
                  (fun h => node 3 ll lx (Ordnode.singleton x))
                  (fun lrs lrl lrx lrr h =>
                    if lrs < ratio * lls then node (ls + 1) ll lx (node (lrs + 1) lr x nil)
                    else node (ls + 1) (node (lls + lrl.size + 1) ll lx lrl) lrx (node (lrr.size + 1) lrr x nil))
                  ⋯)
              ⋯)
          (fun rs rl rx rr h =>
            if delta * ls < rs then
              Ordnode.casesOn (motive := fun t => id rl = t → Ordnode α) (id rl) (fun h => nil)
                (fun rls rll rlx rlr h =>
                  Ordnode.casesOn (motive := fun t => id rr = t → Ordnode α) (id rr) (fun h => nil)
                    (fun rrs l_1 x_1 r h =>
                      if rls < ratio * rrs then node (ls + rs + 1) (node (ls + rls + 1) l x rl) rx rr
                      else
                        node (ls + rs + 1) (node (ls + rll.size + 1) l x rll) rlx (node (rlr.size + rrs + 1) rlr rx rr))
                    ⋯)
                ⋯
            else
              if delta * rs < ls then
                Ordnode.casesOn (motive := fun t => id ll = t → Ordnode α) (id ll) (fun h => nil)
                  (fun lls l x_1 r_1 h =>
                    Ordnode.casesOn (motive := fun t => id lr = t → Ordnode α) (id lr) (fun h => nil)
                      (fun lrs lrl lrx lrr h =>
                        if lrs < ratio * lls then node (ls + rs + 1) ll lx (node (lrs + rs + 1) lr x r)
                        else
                          node (ls + rs + 1) (node (lls + lrl.size + 1) ll lx lrl) lrx
                            (node (lrr.size + rs + 1) lrr x r))
                      ⋯)
                  ⋯
              else node (ls + rs + 1) l x r)
          ⋯)
      ⋯ =
    l.balance' x r
